release_notes: Multi-order picker; GC mandate pagination fix; payment progress in Mandate Active dialog; Replace PayPlan guard
changelog: NEW: DarkOrderPicker dialog for albums with multiple orders — lists all orders with balances, defaults to latest
NEW: Order totals displayed in picker and PayPlan Calculator hotkey (detect_psa_group.py AMBIGUOUS format updated)
FIX: GoCardless mandate lookup now cursor-paginates all customers — fixes 'mandate not found' for accounts beyond page 1
FIX: Replace PayPlan guard — selecting Order 2+ automatically switches to Add PayPlan to protect existing plans
IMPROVED: Mandate Active dialog now shows payment progress (e.g. 6/6 complete, 3/6 paid)
